title: Is this AI? Will it look cheap?
body: We use a streamlined production process — that’s how we keep the price at $499 instead of $5,000. Every video goes through human quality control, includes a natural-sounding voiceover, and is reviewed before delivery. If you’re not happy with the result, we’ll redo it.

title: What’s AEO? Do I really need it?
body: AEO stands for Answer Engine Optimization — it’s how you get set up to be recommended when someone asks ChatGPT or Siri for a local business. A growing share of younger consumers are already using AI tools like ChatGPT instead of Google to find local services. Your competitors aren’t optimized for this yet. You can be first.

title: What if I already have a website?
body: That’s fine — keep it. Your GeoLocally page works alongside your existing site as a high-performance landing page built specifically to rank locally and get recommended by AI. Think of it as your digital storefront that does the heavy lifting your current site can’t.

title: How fast will I see results?
body: Your page goes live in 3–5 business days. Google typically indexes new pages within 1–2 weeks. Many clients see strong local rankings within a couple of months, but results and timing vary by market and competition. Some clients also report being cited by AI assistants within weeks of going live — though AI recommendations depend on many factors including your reviews and overall online presence.
